name: Yasutora Sado

name: Tsukasa Yugi
description: Yugi Tsukasa is a ghost haunting Kamome Academy. He currently resides at the school's broadcasting club room, with its members Sakura and Natsuhiko. ~!He is the younger twin brother of Amane Yugi. He is said to be the polar opposite of Hanako. Where Hanako grants the wish of a living person, Tsukasa grants the wish of a dead person's lingering spirit!~

name: Klaudia Valentz
nativeName: クラウディア・バレンツ
description: __Height:__ 164 cm Klaudia is the daughter of wealthy travelling merchant. She possesses a refined aura and kind personality. She has an interest in music and practices playing the flute, but hides it from her father. When visiting Kurken Island she makes friends with Ryza, Lent and Tao, and becomes one of the members of the secret hideout. Together they share many adventures over the summer.

name: Sachiko Fujinuma
description: Sachiko is Satoru's mother and former news announcer. She possesses a sharp eye and is quick to observe any irregularities. She knows about the cold cases of serial kidnapping in her town but decided to keep quiet and ignore it due to her child's growth and safety.

Though Shichika is in love with her, his lack of interest in her body allows her to be shameless around him, so she can be naked around him without worrying about being taken advantage of. name: Ikki Kurogane
description: Ikki Kurogane is an F-rank Apprentice Knight who strives to become a real Mage Knight. He is a young man of average height with dark brown hair and brown eyes. A noble young man with a caring personality. Ikki can be very cruel under certain circumstances. When it comes dealing women of his age and the whole academy in general Ikki is really clumsy because he has no prior experience with them outside of respect towards a superior or as a knight. name: Lei Qiang
description: A member of a legendary assassin clan called "Chi You" that is exceptional in combat and uses the notorious Dance of Death. She fights with a sword named "Lu Seui".

name: Mion Sonozaki
description: Mion is the oldest kid in Keiichi's class. As the elder, she is the class president and everyone looks up to her as the leader. She acts like a perverted tomboy and calls herself old man, but has a hidden girlish side. Mion is next in line to be the head of the Sonozaki household, one of the Three Families which holds tremendous influence in Hinamizawa. name: Hikaru Kusakabe
description: A second year high school student. He's an average student but a talented musician. Very comfortable around people and usually speaks his mind.

name: Freeza
description: Freeza is a fictional graphic novel supervillain who first appears in the Dragon Ball manga created by Akira Toriyama. Freeza also appears in the television special Bardock: The Father of Goku ; a few Dragon Ball Z movies, and in Dragon Ball GT . He is one of the most powerful major supervillains introduced throughout the Dragon Ball universe. She loves creating gadgets, which she refers to as her "super cute babies". name: Susumu Nakoshi
description: Susumu Nakoshi is a middle-aged man living in his car. Spending his time between a park full of homeless people and upper-class complex hotel, he is chosen by Manabu Ito to be an experimental guinea pig because he is neither an egocentric wealthy guy, nor a pitiful homeless man. He is "just between". After the Trepanation he is able to see the "monster" in each human being, things that frighten or obsess people. name: Mio Chibana
description: Mio is a 20-year-old freeter. After his mother's death, he briefly moves to Okinawa, where he meets Shun. Initially offended at Shun's attitude, he soon falls in love and pursues him romantically when he returns to Okinawa. Mio attempts to get better understanding of Shun's concerns, despite Shun constantly dismissing his advances.

name: Satou Matsuzaka
description: Satou Matsuzaka learns to love for the first time after meeting [Shio Koube](https://anilist.co/character/126755) and lives with her in a shared apartment. Publically, she tells people that she resides with her aunt in her apartment, and keeps the fact that she lives with Shio a secret. Satou is a freshman at Makikou High School and primarily works at Cure á Cute, maintaining a kind nature and getting along well with other people in order to sustain her lifestyle with Shio. name: Kikoru Shinomiya
description: __Height:__ 157 cm She is the young daughter of Defense Force Director General [Isao Shinomiya](https://anilist.co/character/257340) and a member of the Third Division. After Tachikawa Base was destroyed, Kikoru was transferred to the First Division.

name: Luka Urushibara
description: __Height:__ 161 cm (5'3") Second year in Kasensou Private Prepatory Academy. Mayuri's classmate. Luka has the personality of a polite, well-groomed, and justified kind of person. Uses honorifics specifically with Rintarou. Luka doesn't push their opinions much upon others, but when they do they become quite bashful and blush quite a bit. Because they're quite serious by nature, they simply believe what others say. Thanks to that, Luka thinks all the ridiculous stuff Rintarou talks about is real.
